chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-501 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on M.A. 2563/20 (Stay) 3. For hearing of main case 21.05.2020 Mr. Zahid Mallah advocate for petitioners. M/s Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl.A.G, Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G. along with I.O of the case ASI Anwar Hussain P.S. Khorwah, SIP Imran Hafeez S.H.O P.S Khorwah, and Inspector Muhammad Khan incharge Complaint Cell Badin. -.-.-. Statements filed by respondents No.2, 3 and 5 are taken on record. This petition has essentially been filed for quashment of F.I.R. bearing Crime No.15/2020, registered u/s 436, 34 PPC, P.S. Badin. In response to the notices, ASI Anwar Hussain, I.O of the case, along with SIP Imran Hafeez, S.H.O P.S Khorwah, and Inspector Muhammad Khan, incharge Complaint Cell Badin, has appeared and submits that after investigation the case has been challaned and presently is pending before Civil Judge & Judicial Magistrate Badin. After having come to know this fact, learned counsel for petitioners does not press this petition and submits that for the same relief he will avail remedy by filing application u/s 249-A Cr.P.C. before the trial court. Accordingly, this petition in above terms is disposed of along with listed application. However, if such application is filed before the trial court, the same shall be decided expeditiously in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE
